meaning: 清津[朝鲜民主主义人民共和国东北部港市]
examples: On the flipside, Chongjin is an industrial city in the northeast that specializes in steelwork.
I had the good fortune to meet many wonderful people from Chongjin who were both articulate and generous with their time.
On the morning of September 22, fishermen of the fishery station in Rajin-Sonbong city caught a 10 cm-long white sea cucumber while fishing on the waters off Chongjin.
